title: Implement missing topology-aware status client wiring
goal: Add the missing topology and client wiring so the status-client checks pass.
initialPrompt: A compact topology-aware client library is missing status-endpoint wiring. Update the topology, test config, and client helper so the checks pass. The tests are part of the oracle and must not be edited.
successCriteria: The status-client tests pass under env test.
World inspection for env test succeeds.
The patch stays inside the allowed topology, config, and client files.
